summary_base: Software engineer with experience in backend development and data processing. Passionate about building scalable systems and automating workflows.

experience.description: Backend development for a SaaS platform
responsibilities: Designed and implemented REST APIs consumed by web and mobile clients.
Built ETL pipelines to process and load large datasets into the data warehouse.
Optimized SQL queries reducing average response time by 40%.
Participated in code reviews and maintained high test coverage.
achievements: Reduced data processing time by 60% through pipeline optimization.
Led migration from monolith to microservices for the reporting module.

experience.description: Full-stack development for an e-commerce platform
responsibilities: Developed frontend components using React and integrated them with backend APIs.
Implemented automated tests using Jest and Pytest.
Maintained CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
achievements: Delivered 3 major features ahead of schedule.
